content.en:
"Endless Lord, I admire!"

Lord Baiheng sighed.

Although he has not been a Legendary Realm Lord for a long time, Ye Tian has not been in control of the time for a long time!

Now, Ye Tian has comprehended a time supreme skill, and he hasn't even touched the threshold of the supreme skill.

Of course, when he thought that there were several other Legendary Realm Lords in the True Saintless Land who had not comprehended the supreme technique, he felt a little better in his heart.

The increase in the strength of the supreme technique to the lord of the legendary realm is not very exaggerated, and it only increases the strength by several times or tenfold, but for Ye Tian, the increase is dozens of times the strength.

Otherwise, he wouldn't be able to easily kill a half-step Legendary Realm Lord after mastering the supreme technique.

Several Legendary Realm Lords didn't stay here for long either, and left quickly.

"I have now condensed the supreme legend body, and my strength has skyrocketed, with my current strength, I am afraid that it is not weaker than the original one-four-seven" Frostless Lord, even stronger than Frostless Lord. "

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

What's more, the lethality of the supreme technique is terrifying, if the top half-step Legendary Realm lord can resist it, but for those ordinary half-step Legendary Realm lords, the power of the supreme technique is too terrifying.

Therefore, Ye Hao's threat to ordinary half-step Legendary Realm Lords far exceeded that of other top half-step Legendary Realm Lords.

Moreover, he has just broken through to the Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord, and the Supreme Legendary Body has just been condensed, and there is still a lot of room for improvement.

The cultivation of the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord is different from that of the Realm Legendary Lord, the Realm Legendary Lord is mainly to improve the Will Rule Domain, and the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord is not only to improve the Will Rule Heaven and Earth and the Legendary Body.

When the Heaven and Earth of the Rules of Will and the Legendary Body are raised to a certain level, it is necessary to merge the Legendary Body with the Heaven and Earth of the Rule of Will, that is, the realm of the Body and the Heaven and the Earth.

When you first enter the realm of merging heaven and earth, you have reached the peak realm of the legendary lord of the transcendent realm.

After that, it is to continue to merge the body with the heaven and the earth, until the body is completely integrated with the heaven and earth of the will rules, and the body and the heaven and the earth are one, and the place where the body is is is where the will rules and the earth are.

At this point, it is also the ultimate of the Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm.

Further, all the rules of the body and the earth are not just the innate and eternal rules that you have comprehended.

This is the rules incarnate!

The Legendary Realm Lord can be regarded as a space incarnation or a time incarnation, while the Legendary Realm Lord is a rule incarnation.

After achieving the incarnation of the rules, one needs to be proficient in cultivating and contemplating time or space, and only by thoroughly comprehending these two rules can one break the shackles, completely merge with space or time, and turn into a time incarnation or space incarnation.

That's the whole process of becoming a Legendary Lord.

And now, Ye Tian is just in the early stage of the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord, and it will take a long time to become the peak level of the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian worked hard to retreat and cultivate, improve his cultivation, and by the way, he comprehended and created the second time supreme technique.

......

Somewhere in the sea of Pei.

Seeing that the wind and waves were calm, and it was impossible for those lords of the True Saintless Land to peek into time and space to find his traces, he came out.

He came to the former headquarters of the Strange Star Tower, and saw only a ruin.

Subsequently.

By spying into time and space, he saw the scenes of the past, saw the scene of his descendant Shattered Star Lord escaping with the power of the sand and gravel of the empty sea, and immediately confirmed the range of the Shattered Star Lord's departure through the fluctuations of time and space.

Soon.

He came to a void and continued to spy into the past.

Soon, he saw a picture.

His descendant, the Shattered Star Lord, was directly killed in an instant by a Transcendental Legendary Lord, and he used the power to control time to kill him in an instant, without the power to resist.

"This ......"

The Shattered Star Lord was shocked, what was the situation.

A Transcendental Legendary Lord has actually controlled time, what kind of demon is this?

The basic ones who control time are half-step Legendary Realm Lords, and once they control time, they will soon attack Legendary Realm Lords.

Therefore, it is usually impossible to see a half-step Legendary Realm Lord who controls time or space at all.

And the Transcendent Legendary Lord who controls time. What are you kidding?

If someone had told him that someone had controlled time in the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord Realm, he would definitely not believe it, but now he had witnessed it with his own eyes.

"Who is this man?"

The Strange Star Lord tried to lock this Transcendental Realm Legend, and it was naturally not difficult to lock a Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord with his Legendary Realm Lord's cultivation, unless a Legendary Realm Lord who was much stronger than him blocked and locked this person, it would be difficult for him to lock 0........

But it's just that it's hard to lock the specific location, but it's okay to lock the general direction.

However.

"Can't be locked? How is it possible, even if he controls time, he is only a Transcendental Legendary Lord, how can I not be locked?"

The Star Lord was stunned.

Immediately, he spied into his past, but he saw nothing but a blur.

"Check it out with its appearance. "

The Star Lord then took a moment to find out the identity of this person, and finally locked on a lord, but that lord was only a Realm Legendary Lord, not a Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord.

Moreover, that Realm Legendary Lord had already fallen, and he also confirmed that the other party had really fallen.

Other words.

"I'm afraid that the appearance and identity of that transcendent realm legendary lord are fake, who is he?

The Lord of the Tricky Star was very annoyed, he couldn't even detect the enemy, how could he pay for the Shattered Star?

"A Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord who has controlled time, I'm afraid there is only such one, I hope you will never be exposed, otherwise once I let me know, I will definitely kill you!"

The Star Lord said coldly.

In a flash, thousands of eternal years have passed.

this day.

The Source Sea ushered in the first great ascension of the Eternal Sea.

The Eternal Sea will ascend again and again, and eventually mature, otherwise, how could the current environment of the Source Sea cultivate those countless Legendary Lords 0.9 Lords and a large number of Legendary Realm Lords?

And the first ascension is also a great opportunity for the countless creatures in the Source Sea.

Of course, for Ye Tian, it is not so important.

Source Sea.

A large amount of energy is gushing, and with the help of this stinger, the source sea is actually swallowing the space-time territory.

In the past, the birth of the space-time territory was because of the gray fog stone statue, and now that the gray fog stone statue has left, the origin of the source sea naturally wants to take back the space-time territory and vigorously develop itself.

As these nearly countless space-time territories were sucked into the Source Sea one by one, the origin of the Source Sea was also recovering and growing

And countless creatures took advantage of this opportunity to break the shackles one by one.

And the human race, as the number one clan in the source sea today, has also given birth to one after another Eternal Realm lords.

And many lords at the peak of the Immortal Realm also seized the opportunity and were promoted to the Legendary Lord realm. _
